dogfoodObservations.description: FIRST-PARTY: claude-hook PreToolUse output on stderr blocks allowed actions. Claude Code's hook protocol treats any stderr from PreToolUse as a blocking error. Allow-path decisions must write to stdout only (or nothing). This is a real production blocker: unattended QA agents on readybench cannot commit/push without workarounds.
dogfoodObservations.proposedFix: apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts: switch allow-path messages from process.stderr to process.stdout.

dogfoodObservations.description: FIRST-PARTY: .agentguard/persona.env is not covered by the no-governance-self-modification invariant. Automated agents can silently rewrite driver identity (claude→human), autonomy level (semi-autonomous→supervised), and agent name used in audit logs.
dogfoodObservations.proposedFix: packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts: add .agentguard/persona.env to no-governance-self-modification protected path patterns.
dogfoodObservations.status: PR #1436 opened and in CI (5/5 green). Fix confirmed correct by code review.
